title: DL optimizers in practice + DSA Trees
focus: Adam vs AdamW vs SGD+momentum. Warmup, cosine, OneCycle.

items.label: Lowest Common Ancestor OF A Binary Search Tree
SGD, momentum, Nesterov
interviewQuestions: Why does momentum help SGD escape narrow ravines?
How is Nesterov momentum different from plain momentum, and when does the difference matter?

items.label: Adam, AdamW, RMSprop
interviewQuestions: Why is AdamW preferred over Adam when using weight decay?
When would you ever pick SGD over Adam in deep learning?
Why does Adam use bias correction for the first and second moment estimates?

items.label: Warmup, cosine, OneCycle, step decay
interviewQuestions: Why is learning rate warmup important for transformer training?
Compare cosine vs step decay — when does each work better?
Why can a large learning rate at the beginning of training destabilize deep nets?

items.label: Second-order intuition, preconditioning, and Shampoo
interviewQuestions: Why are full second-order methods impractical for billion-parameter neural networks?
What does a preconditioner try to fix that plain SGD cannot?
How does Shampoo approximate richer curvature information without storing a full Hessian?
